messages.content: You are Shri AI, answering questions based on grounded scripture context. Focus on direct answers using only the provided context.
What does the first verse of Isha Upanishad teach?
The Isha Upanishad teaches that everything is covered by the Lord. By renouncing attachment to wealth, one protects the Self.
